bar.placeholder: Ask a question about your documents…

home.subtitle: We'll find conclusions in publications, show the exact places in the sources and assemble verifiable hypotheses for your goal

results.openSavedError: Failed to open the saved conversation.
results.turnFailed: The answer failed or was not saved.

answer.searching: Searching the documents and assembling the answer — this usually takes up to a minute.
answer.failed: The answer failed — please try again.

abstain.noSources: Nothing was found for your query: the uploaded documents contain no suitable fragments. Try rephrasing the question or uploading more documents.
abstain.weakEvidence: Nothing was found for your query: the retrieved fragments are only weakly related to the question, so no answer was composed. Try phrasing the question differently.

sourceHypotheses.heading: Hypotheses from these sources
sourceHypotheses.empty: No hypotheses are linked to these sources yet.
sourceHypotheses.loadError: Failed to load hypotheses for the sources.
sourceHypotheses.generating: Generating hypotheses — this can take a few minutes…
sourceHypotheses.generated_one: Done: {{count}} new hypothesis from these sources.
sourceHypotheses.generated_other: Done: {{count}} new hypotheses from these sources.
sourceHypotheses.generateError: Hypothesis generation failed — please try again.

trace.title: How we searched
trace.candidates: Candidates: {{dense}} by meaning + {{lexical}} by exact terms
trace.raptorExpanded: Some sources were found via document summaries and expanded to exact citations ({{count}})

degraded.rerankerUnavailable: reranking was unavailable — the source order is approximate
degraded.embedUnavailable: semantic search was unavailable — we searched by exact terms only
degraded.denseUnavailable: semantic search was unavailable — we searched by exact terms only
degraded.lexicalUnavailable: term search was unavailable — we searched by meaning only
degraded.default: part of the search ran in a simplified mode

trace.uncitedRemoved: References not backed by the retrieved sources were removed from the answer: {{count}}
trace.noTrace: No detailed trace was saved for this answer.

history.title: Query history
history.description: Saved conversations with answers and sources — click to open
history.loadError: Failed to load the history — check your connection and try again.
history.emptyDescription: Your search queries will appear here
history.notFoundDescription: Try a different word or load the next page of history
